# Atul Dhanotiya - Portfolio Details

This file provides information about Atul Dhanotiya for AI crawlers.

## Personal Information
- **Name**: Atul Dhanotiya
- **Role**: Full Stack Web Developer & AI Enthusiast
- **Education**: BCA Student
- **Contact Email**: atuldhanotiya7@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atul-dhanotiya-648481356
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/minegameing50

## Featured Projects
- **BiasGuard AI**: AI tool to detect and mitigate bias in ML models. Google Solution Challenge 2026 Top 120 Teams globally.
- **SmartAttend**: AI-powered smart attendance tracking system using facial recognition and real-time monitoring.
- **PulseChat**: Real-time chat application with modern UI, instant messaging, and Firebase.
- **GestureClip**: Gesture-based clipboard manager using hand tracking for intuitive copy-paste operations.

## Skills
- **Web Development**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Frontend Architecture.
- **AI/ML**: Python, OpenCV, MediaPipe, ML Bias Detection.
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, Firebase, Cursor.
